关于.text:
LOGIN
 
(ABOUT)

K-Design Award fairly evaluates the achievements of designers worldwide and archives their value. Through recognition and kudos, we prove the true value of design.

English
THE WORLD'S BEST:
K-DESIGN AWARD
 
 

The K-Design Award is defined by a rigorous and unbiased evaluation system that proves the true value of design. Winning is not just recognition—it is a validation of capability, a mark of credibility, and a foundation for global opportunity. Since its establishment in 2012, over 20,000 designers and companies have participated, using this platform to prove their work on a global stage and establish themselves in the international design industry.

 
VISION
BEYOND ACHIEVEMENT
PROVING THE VALUE
KUDOS FOR
YOUR DESIGN!

The K-Design Award is supported by a global network of leading media, companies, and industry experts. It connects designers, judges, and key players under a unified standard, turning exposure into real opportunities in the global market.

 
K-DESIGN AWARD
IN NUMBERS
55
REGIONS
3,083
WINNER DESIGNS
20,842
PARTICIPATING DESIGNERS
 
MISSION
OUR MISSION IS TO DISCOVER
VALUABLE DESIGNS AND MAXIMIZE
THEIR PRESTIGE.
 
WINNING RATIO

Not everyone wins. Only the best do.

 

1 Kudos to the Best
0.1% Grand Prize
1% Gold Winner
10% Winner

 
FAIRNESS
GLOBAL JURY AUTHORITY

Over 33 professors and design directors from 7 countries serve as judges, applying a unified and rigorous standard. Each work is evaluated based solely on its quality and value, ensuring a fair and unbiased result.

RECOGNIZING VALUE

Judges’ evaluation comments are published alongside their profiles in the online exhibition, ensuring full transparency in the review process. This strengthens the credibility of the results and enhances the trust and recognition of the winning works.

RIGOROUS SELECTION

Entries go through two rigorous rounds of online evaluation, with only 0.1% selected as Grand Prize winners. All works are assessed under a unified standard, ensuring a fair and unbiased process where only the most outstanding designs are recognized.

 
INSPIRED
GLOBAL DESIGN NETWORK

Winning records are systematically accumulated and serve as a recognized benchmark referenced by leading companies and institutions. These achievements function as credible proof of capability, supporting designers in building a strong global portfolio.

PARTNERS

We partner with leading global design media, companies, and institutions to bring award-winning work to an international audience. Through this network, projects are not only showcased but also connected to industry and market opportunities, creating real pathways for global recognition and collaboration.

GLOBAL MEDIA & EXHIBITION

DESIGNSORI, the organizer, is a leading design media platform in Korea that has long documented the voices of designers. Through its online exhibitions and media platforms, it continuously presents valuable work and connects it to industry and market opportunities worldwide.

 
PERMANENT
WINNER RANKING

Winning records are systematically accumulated and recognized by leading companies and institutions worldwide. They serve as credible proof of achievement and a lasting foundation for building a global design career.

WINNER IDENTITY

Award-certified logos are provided in formats optimized for various platforms, ensuring a consistent and professional brand presence across all channels. This allows winning work to communicate credibility more effectively wherever it appears.

SUBMIT NOW
KUDOS

规则.text:
LOGIN
 
(RULES)

Clear regulations and a structured system ensure fairness. This trust forms the foundation that proves the authority and value of the award.

English
K-Design Award 2026

The K-Design Award evaluates projects in industrial design, communication design, and spatial design. Eligible entries include projects that have already been commercialized and released to the market, as well as concept-stage designs that have not yet been commercialized. The award aims to discover projects that demonstrate feasibility and a strong creative vision through innovative ideas, future-oriented proposals, and experimental approaches, thereby enhancing the professional stature and brand value of designers.

2026
RULES
SUBMISSION

Early : April 3 - April 28, 2026 (24:00 KST)

Standard : April 29 - May 30, 2026 (24:00 KST)

Late : May 31 - June 30, 2026 (24:00 KST)

SCHEDULE

Announcement of Finalist : July 10, 2026

Announcement of Winner : July 30, 2026

Online Exhibition : August 18, 2026

Winner Ceremony (Seoul) : October, 2026

Winner Package Shipping : October 31, 2026

QUALIFICATION FOR SUBMISSION

Everyone around the world can participate

NUMBER OF MEMBERS

Company / Professional / Student : Max. 5 people

*To qualify as a student submission, students can submit until one year after their graduation.

ENTRY FEE

- Early

Company (Commercial) : US$ 280

Professional (Non-Commercial) : US$ 245

Student (Non-Commercial) : Free

 

- Standard

Company (Commercial) : US$ 320

Professional (Non-Commercial) : US$ 285

Student (Non-Commercial) : US$ 70

 

- Late

Company (Commercial) : US$ 360

Professional (Non-Commercial) : US$ 325

Student (Non-Commercial) : US$ 85

FINALIST JUDGING FEE

Company : US$ 700

Professional : US$ 650

Student : US$ 190

WINNER PACKAGE FEE (OPTION)

Company : US$ 95

Professional : US$ 85

Student : US$ 75

AWARD CATEGORIES

1. INDUSTRIAL

2. SPACE

3. COMMUNICATION

SUBMISSION METHOD

Online Upload

ENTRY PROCESS

1. SUBMISSION - Online Application

2. PRE JUDGING - First Round of Online Screening

3. FINALIST - Second Round of Online Screening

4. FINAL JUDGING - Finalist Announcement

5. WINNER - Announcement of Winners

6. AWARD CEREMONY - Offline Award Ceremony

7. K-DESIGN FORUM - Offline Award Ceremony

8. WINNER PACKAGE - Sending of the Winner Package

EVALUATION CRITERIA

Aesthetics

Originality

Practicality

AWARD

Kudos to the Best : 1 Team

Grand Prize : 0.1%

Gold Winner : 1%

Winner : 10%

*The figures mentioned above are subject to change.

WINNER SERVICE

On-Line Exhibition, License to Display Winner Logo

K-Design Award custom font usage rights

Winner Package : Certificate(1) & Yearbook(1)

PANEL GUIDELINES
1. Industrial / 2. Space

▲ Mandatory

Minimum 2 ~ Maximum 3 sheets
250x180mm or 180x250mm
JPG, RGB, Max 2MB each file

*Photo or Rendering

*Don't use any text and lines.

*It is possible to synthesize.

▲ Option 1

Maximum 3 sheets
250x180mm or 180x250mm
JPG, RGB, Max 2MB each file

*Photo or Rendering

*Don't use any text and lines.

*It is possible to synthesize.

Option 2

Video
YouTube or YOUKU Video URL
3. Communication

Mandatory

Minimum 2 ~ Maximum 6 sheets
250x180mm or 180x250mm
JPG, RGB, Max 2MB each file

*There are no restrictions.

Option

Video
YouTube or YOUKU Video URL
 
TEXT GUIDELINES

Summary (English)

Max. 300 characters

Description (English)

Max. 650 characters

Summary (Native language)

Max. 250 characters

Description (Native language)

Max. 600 characters

* There are separate text entry boxes online.

FAQ.text:
Q. How will the screening take place?
A. Twenty four of globally renowned designed experts will be make up the judging panel and conducting the screening.

Q. How does the registration process take place?
A. You can easily submit your works by just uploading your image.

Q. Is there a limitation in the number of works submitted for the screening?
A. No, there is noparticular limit on the number of works for those who register their content.

Q. I have many images to submit. How do I submit them? Is there a limit in the size of the image?
A. We have a limitation of 3 images for the maximum number of uploaded images. Please refer to the guidelines of submission for the detailed standard.

Q. Do I have to construct the panel image in English?
A. The image composition is up to the designer. However, you have to construct it in English.

Q. Can I register both as an individual and team participant?
A. Yes, it is possible. But, we have a limitation of up to 3 people for a joint submission.

Q. Do you only accept online registration/ submission of works?
A. We do not accept offline registrations. You can only register through our online upload function.

Q. Are there screening regulations during the screening?
A. The works which focus on outstanding aesthetics, scarcity value, and conveyance delivery are favored, and will in turn receive a greater number of points.

Q. Who will hold the possession of the copyright of the awarded works?
A. The exhibitor will hold the possession of the copyright and you can feel free to make submission to other contests. However, the sponsor holds the right of redistribution of the awarded works. 

Q. Are teams inquired to have a representative (i.e. team leader) when registering as a team?
A. Not necessarily. You can form a group up to 3 people as you wish.

Q. Does the information of the team members have to be precisely listed during the registration?
A. When submitting works, there is no need to display any information about the team members as well as personal data. Information will only be required for the product plaque after the results of the winners are announced.

Q. Is it possible to submit works which were awarded in other contests?
A. It is possible if the copyright is possessed by the exhibitor.

Q. Are overlapping registrations/ awards possible? 
A. Yes, it is possible. We would like to ask for your active participation and attention.
